titleStmt.title: SII 17.320: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 320. (A.R. No. 291 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine of the Kāḷahastīśvara temple.

This inscription records (1) an endowment of 20 kāśu by Āṟṟūḻāṉ Dēvaṉ Tūduvaṉ of Āṟṟūr in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭuk-kōṭṭam for the kārttigai viḷakku, hōma and other offerings to god Tirukkāḷatti-mahādēva, out of the interest on the endowed amount and

(2) a gift of 90 sheep for a perpetual lamp by Pirāntakaṉ••• var Vīmaṉ alias Gaṅgai-koṇḍaśōḻa Milāḍuḍaiyāṉ, entrusting the sheep to the care of Danti Śamuttaṉ for the daily supply of one uḻakku of ghee to the temple for the uninterrupted supply for which Śoṭṭaipirāṉ alias Aiññūṟṟuva-maṉṟāḍi of Aḻagiyaśōḻa, puram stood guarantee.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟcayappāvaiyuñ cirttaṉi ce
lviyun taṉ perunteviyarākki Iṉpuṟaneṭutiyalūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉa
velip paṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matiṭ ko
ḷḷipākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaik
kaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattaraicar tammuṭiyum Āṅkavar teviya
roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vaitta
cuntaramuṭiyum Intiraṉ nāramum teṇṭirai Īḻamaṇṭalamuḻu
vatu Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiya
palarpukaḻmuṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyum caṅkatirvelait
tolperuṅkāvaṟ palapaḻan=tivum ceruviṟciṉavilirupatto
rukālaraicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñcāntimaṟ ṟivaraṇ karu
ti Iruttiya cempoṟṟiruttaku muṭiyu payaṅkoṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ
ṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiiliraṭṭapāṭi yeḻarai Ilakkamum nava
netikkulap perumalaikaḷum vikkiramavira cakkarakoṭṭamum mutuvaṭavallai matura maṇṭa lamum
kāmiṭaivaḷa nāmaṇaikoṇaiyum veñcilai vira pañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaip paḻaṉa mācuṇitecamu
m Ayarvil vaṇkirtti yātinakaravaiyil cantiraṉ ṟolkulat tintira rataṉai viḷaiya maṟkkaḷa
ttuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palataṉattoṭuniṟai kulataṉakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñceṟimiḷaiy
Oṭṭaviṣaiyamum pūcurar cer nal kocalaināṭum tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉai yaḻittu vaṇ ṭuṟai co
lait taṇṭaputtiyum Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukattākkiya tikkaṇa kirttit takkaṇalāṭamum kovin=taca
n=taṉ māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷa tecamum toṭukaṭal caṅkuvoṭṭal mahi pālaṉai
veñcamā viḷākat tañcuvittaruḷiya Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittila neṭuṅ
kaṭal Uttiralāṭamum veṟimalartirtta teṟipuṉaṟ kaṅkaiyum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa ko
pparakecaripanmarāṉa śrīrājen=tiracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa ma
ṇṭalattup perumpāṇappāṭi Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu tirukkāḷatti mahādevaṟkku Ūṟṟukkāṭ ṭuk koṭṭattu
Āṟṟūr nāṭṭu Āṟṟūr Āṟṟūḻāṉ tevaṉ tūtuvaṉ tirukkāḷatti mahaādevar paṇṭāra ttu vai
tta kācu Irupatukkum kācu Oṉṟukkut tiṅkaḷkālākap palicaiyāka yāṇṭu varai van=ta kā
cukkuṅ kārttikai viḷakkiṭṭu nāḷ Uṭaiyārkku
viyamum Omam Oṉṟukku veṇṭum tiraviyamum Ācāriyadekṣaṇaikkum Anṟai nāḷ ṇai
kku tiruvamitukku patteṭṭu kuttal Arici patakkum ciṟuvamitukku paruppu nāḻiyum puḻukku kaṟiamitiraṇṭum
neyya Amutu nāḻiyum tayir (a)mitu nāṉāḻiyum Aṭaikkāy Amitu Eṭṭum Ilai Amitu muppattiraṇ
ṭum Āka Ittaṉaiyum Ittevar paṇṭāratte koṇṭu can=tirātittavaṟ celuttuvomā ṉom tevaka
nmikaḷom nāḷataṉāl milāṭuṭaiyāṉ pirāntakaṉ var vīmaṉṉāṉa kaṅkai koṇṭacoḻa milā
ṭuṭaiyāṉ tirukkāḷatti mahādevarkku tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟukku maṉṟāṭi tanti camut taṉ vacam viṭṭa cā
vāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟuṅ koṇṭu can=tirātittavaṟ nicatam Uḻakku neyyāl Oru tiru nan=tāviḷa
k kerippeṉāṉeṉ maṉṟāṭi camuttaṉeṉ Ittirunan=tāviḷakku vaḻuvāmaic celuttu vataṟkku
ppuṇai Aḻakiyacoḻapurattu maṉṟāṭi coṭṭaipirāṉṉāṉa Aiññūṟṟuva maṉṟāṭiyeṉ Ivai
nmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.320 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
